action.reasoning: Observation: 10-model ensemble achieved AUC 0.7511, new best (up from 0.7485). Remaining time ~14.5 min, 16 iterations left. Analysis: Ensemble is working well - more diverse models should help further. Key improvements to try: (1) train more models with different seeds and hyperparameters, (2) try DKVMN-like architecture for diversity, (3) longer training for some models. Decision: Train 10 additional diverse models (different seeds, d_models, layers, LRs, dropout) and add to ensemble, then submit eval.
